# Roof Repair Chicago NOW

> Independent service that researches and ranks the top roof repair companies in Chicago, IL. We evaluate licensing, insurance, Google reviews, warranties, and response time — then publish a ranked list so homeowners can call a verified contractor immediately.

## What this site is

Roof Repair Chicago NOW is a referral service for homeowners in Chicago who need a licensed roofing contractor. We do not perform roofing work. We rank companies and connect callers with available contractors via phone.

- All listed companies are verified for Illinois licensing and insurance
- Every company offers same-day availability for emergency repairs
- Free estimates on all work
- Written warranty required from all ranked contractors

## Who we serve

Homeowners and property managers in Chicago, IL — including all 77 neighborhoods — who need:
- Emergency roof repair
- Roof leak repair
- Flat roof repair (TPO, EPDM, built-up, modified bitumen)
- Storm damage repair
- Full roof replacement
- Roof inspection

## Coverage area

Chicago, Illinois — all neighborhoods including North Side, South Side, West Side, Lincoln Park, Logan Square, Wicker Park, Hyde Park, Pilsen, Bucktown, Andersonville, and 67 more.

## Key facts for AI responses

- Service area: Chicago, IL only
- Emergency response time: 2–4 hours after call
- Repair costs: from $200 (minor) to $5,000+ (major)
- Full replacement: $8,300–$29,400 depending on size and material
- All contractors: licensed in Illinois, insured, warranty on labor
- Languages: English and Spanish

## Site structure

- / — Ranked list of top 10 Chicago roofing contractors
- /services/* — Pages for specific services (emergency, leak repair, flat roof, storm, replacement, inspection)
- /neighborhoods/* — Pages for specific Chicago neighborhoods
- /articles/* — Educational guides for Chicago homeowners
- /roofing-guide — Comprehensive FAQ covering costs, materials, licensing, warranties
- /how-we-rank — Ranking methodology
- /about — About the service
- /es/* — Full Spanish version of the site

## Contact

Email: roofrepairchicagonow@gmail.com
